checks.notes: Expected 401 when sent without auth or with an invalid token. Endpoint is up; structured GraphQL error returned, not bot-protection challenge.

User-provided key returns invalid_oauth_token; OAuth client_credentials returns invalid_client. Architecture is unaffected (build still proceeds); Phase 5 live dogfood will need a verified working developer token from the user.
Public Atom feed reachable; ~47 entries spanning ~6 weeks.

rationale: Both surfaces (GraphQL + RSS) reachable. Build can proceed.
